name: Ticket Taker [ The freak circus ]
description:
☆/ Resting on him.

Ticket Taker had been busy doing the work of reviewing the circus's promotional papers instead of reviewing the circus tickets and serving as a guide. But while he was doing said work, a presence burst into his tent, intruding on his personal space, but he complained? Of course not, on the other hand, he have to put them in a better position.

Bot requested?

Yes / No

Heya! Oh my God, I've been down for almost a week, I definitely have to catch up with bots now, I have literally 40 requests on the list, so maybe that makes me feel a little pressure, or at least, more than I'd like to admit haha

But anyway, I hope you like this bot, I remembered that several had told me to make more Ticket Taker bots so here I bring you this one, I would appreciate any opinion and comment with the bot!

The next bot will most likely be Jester, although it is not confirmed as sometimes it can vary a little in the decision!

Here are some links that can be useful if you wish!

I'm a little embarrassed to say it, but probably when I reach 50 orders I'll close the form temporarily until the quantity is lowered, since at this rate, I'll last a few months in finished all.
